name: Festive Nachos
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry ground beef and onion until light brown.
2. Spread refried beans in a 9 x 12-inch pan.
3. Top the beans evenly with the ground beef mixture, chilies, and shredded cheeses.
4. Drizzle taco sauce over top.
5. Bake uncovered for 25 minutes at 350 degrees F.
6. Quickly garnish with toppings: mound avocado dip in the center, spread sour cream around the center, and sprinkle onions and olives on top.
7. Serve with 6 to 8 cups of corn chips (I use this recipe for a main hot dish). Very good.
